author: poDf
content: Plan: read the 4 source files in crossbridge-e2e, run cargo clippy -p crossbridge-e2e --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic, fix each warning. For lints called out in the issue (similar_names on labels_a/labels_b_after, too_many_lines on submit_then_answer_round_trip), use targeted #[allow(...)] with one-line justification. Avoid blanket allows. Verify cargo test, cargo clippy -- -D warnings, cargo fmt --check at the end.
